scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run --cwd apps/web dev" "bun run --cwd apps/api dev"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run --cwd apps/api build
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd apps/web lint && bun run --cwd apps/api lint
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/api typecheck
